case_title: MAY TRINH VS. GOLDEN GATE DISPOSAL & RECYCLING COMPANY et al

ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JUL-15-2003 CONTINUED TO AUG-19-2003 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 TO COMPLETE ARBITRATION. ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE ON JUL-15-2003 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ASSIGNED TO ARBITRATION FOR MAR-10-2003. FEB-14-2003 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

REMOVED FROM ARBITRATION. CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE ON OCT-10-2003 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT. 212 FOR JUDGMENT, DISMISSAL OR TRIAL DE NOVO. IF FILED, APPEARANCES WAIVED. AUG-19-2003 ARBITRATION OSC IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PURSUANT TO CRC 1615 (C), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT DEFENDANT GOLDEN GATE DISPOSAL & RECYCLING COMPANY RECOVER FROM PLAINTIFF TRINH, MAY ARBITRATOR FINDS IN FAVOR OF DEFENDANT GOLDEN GATE DISPOSAL & RECYCLING COMPANY AND AGAINST PLAINTIFF MAY TRINH, PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM DENIED CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING
